title: psychotria cotejensis
intro: Psychotria cotejensis, also known as the Mayan cocoa plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Psychotria cotejensis include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, which are typically consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
